mechanics.name_guess: The target must make Knockout Check at the
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 117 > npcs > The target must make Knockout Check at the
mechanics.excerpt: The target must make Knockout Check at the end the phase in which he was wounded This i5 standard WIL Attribute Check with base TN of 15 minus the character'$ WIL plus the target' $ Fatigue in excess of his WIL (including the Fatigue just inflicted by this attack) Also apply TN modifiers for any wounds the char- acter has suffered (including the wound just inflicted by this attack) as usual.
